message:
fix(freeze): fix define_method and put_var_ref_check in relooper codegen

- define_method: Use definePropertyValueAtom/definePropertyGetSet with
  proper getter/setter handling (was using non-existent defineMethod)
- put_var_ref_check: Discard bool return from setClosureVarCheckSafe

Enables TypeScript compiler (tsc) to run successfully with EdgeBox.
